name: SSG 08 | 致命站点
descriptionEn: The SSG08 bolt-action is a low-damage but very cost-effective sniper rifle, making it a smart choice for early-round long-range marksmanship. It has been custom painted with fictitious transit diagrams designed around the maps of Counter-Strike. \"Where are we headed?\"
descriptionZh: SSG08 是一把低杀伤力但性价比较高的闩动狙击步枪，是早期回合长距离射击的明智选择。 这款定制涂装围绕《反恐精英》地图设计了虚构的交通线路图。 “我们要去哪里？”
